title: LT-ItemFilter

body:
# LT-ItemFilter - Mod for Minecraft

## 📌 Description
**LT-ItemFilter** is a Minecraft mod that automatically filters items in your inventory. The mod allows you to easily manage a list of items to be kept, so you don't have to worry about accidentally discarding valuable items. With intuitive commands, you can quickly add or remove items or switch filter profiles – all from the chat!

## ✨ Features
- Automatic discarding of unwanted items from your inventory.
- Management of allowed item lists via profiles.
- Easy addition and removal of items from the filter using commands.
- Clear interface with item highlighting (SHIFT) and filter activation (Ctrl+G).
- Generation and loading of configuration from the `ltitemfilter-config.json` file.

| Command                         | Description                                                     |
|---------------------------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------|
| `/ltf filter`                   | Toggle item filter                                              |
| `/ltf add <item>`               | Add an item to the filter                                         |
| `/ltf remove <item>`            | Remove an item from the filter                                    |
| `/ltf list`                     | Display the list of items in the current profile                  |
| `/ltf profiles`                 | List available profiles                                           |
| `/ltf config save`              | Save configuration                                                |
| `/ltf config reload`            | Reload configuration                                              |

Additionally:
- **Ctrl+G** – shortcut to activate filtering (alternatively, use the command `/lts filter`)
- **SHIFT** – highlights items on the ground

## 🛠 Configuration
Upon first launch, the mod generates a configuration file:
```
%appdata%/.minecraft/config/ltitemfilter-config.json
```
In this file where you can manually edit the item lists and filter profiles. Ensure that the file structure remains unchanged – only modify the content of the lists (e.g., by adding item identifiers).

## 👥 Authors
- **LordTricker** – Main mod creator
- **AdversTM** – Assistance with item highlighting
- **Mr. GPT** – Content support 🤖

## 🌍 Contact
- **Website:** [BlazeCode](https://blazecode.pl/)

- **Discord server:** [Discord](https://dc.ltmods.pl/)

> "Bierzcie i korzystajcie z tego wszyscy - to jest bowiem praca moja, która dla was została wykonana" ~LordTricker
